Editor's note

September • October 2004
Journalism & Newsroom

A correction to a previous Uplink article about home construction faults, clarifying that senior projects reporter Dan Tracy should have been credited, with references to his related work in the IRE Resource Center.

In the last issue of Uplink, "Finding faults in new homes" by Katy Miller of the Orlando Sentinel included an incorrect name. It should have referenced senior projects reporter Dan Tracy. Construction stories in which Tracy took part can be found in the IRE Resource Center (www.ire.org/resourcecenter) under Story No. 21240 and 20682.
